[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001101000 3
1 0010001100 3
2 1101101100 6
3 0110110110 6
4 0101001000 3
5 0101001110 5
6 1010010110 5
7 0001101000 3
